phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso dell'agriturismo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH leen-GRES-so del-lah-gree-toor-EEZ-moh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Segua la strada sterrata a destra.
likely_response.pronunciation: seh-GOO-ah LAH STRAH-dah stehr-RAH-tah AH DEH-strah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the dirt road on the right.

responses.english: Follow the dirt road on the right.
responses.phonetic: seh-GOO-ah LAH STRAH-dah stehr-RAH-tah AH DEH-strah
responses.french: Segua la strada sterrata a destra.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, si può fare la degustazione, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, see pwoh FAH-reh lah deh-goos-tah-TSYOH-neh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa la bottiglia di limoncello, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah lah bot-TEE-lyah dee lee-mon-CHEL-loh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: The price is on the label.

responses.english: The price is on the label.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove sono i bagni, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh SOH-noh ee BAH-nyee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: Inside the restaurant, at the back.

responses.english: Inside the restaurant, at the back.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si può parcheggiare, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see pwoh par-KEG-jah-reh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: In the square in front of the entrance.

responses.english: In the square in front of the entrance.
